troubleshooting.cause: Battery depletion or power cable issue
guide: Please check if the power cable is firmly connected to the outlet.
If using battery, please charge for at least 30 minutes.
Check the power switch on the back panel.

troubleshooting.cause: Sensor disconnection or dirty contact points
guide: Detach the sensor and wipe the contact points with a dry cloth.
Reconnect the sensor and wait for 10 seconds.
If the error persists, the sensor might need replacement.
